---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for MarkOS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What capability would you like to add?

## Why

Which workflow does this improve?

## Scope

Which area is affected?

- core
- cli
- server
- docs
- examples

## Proposal

Please describe the smallest useful version of the feature first.

## Notes

If this relates to future roadmap topics such as:
- `markos export`
- `pdf` / `pptx`
- themes
- plugins
- monorepo split

please include expected tradeoffs and affected files when possible.
